info.name: Snowflake User API
info.description:
The Snowflake User API is a REST API that you can use to access, update, and perform certain action on Users in a Snowflake database.

Contact Support:
 Name: Snowflake, Inc.
 Email: support@snowflake.com

item.name: List All Grants to the User

request.description: List all grants to the user

item.name: Grant a Role to the User

request.description: Grant a role to the user
Fetch user information using the result of the DESCRIBE command
Delete a user with the given name.

item.name: Create a (or Alter an Existing) User.

request.description: Create a (or alter an existing) user. Even if the operation is just an alter, the full property set must be provided. Note that password is not currently altered by this operation but is supported for a newly-created object.
Create a user according to the parameters given
Lists the users in the system.

response.name: successful
